text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I knew it... I'm not cut out for this after all... I'll
probably make another weird mistake and lose
again...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Lose again... Uugh, I don't want that. Because...
despite it all, despite everything...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
choice_data_list: I know you can do it!
I know you can do it!
